name: Reteno
description: AI-powered messaging platform for mobile app retention, churn prevention and subscription winback across push, email, in-app and SMS.

seo.title: Reteno — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Reteno: AI-powered messaging platform for mobile app retention, churn prevention and subscription winback across push, email, in-app and SMS.

when_to_use: Subscription winback campaigns via push and email automation
Churn prevention triggers based on in-app behavior signals
AI-driven re-engagement across push, SMS, and in-app channels

pros: Multi-channel retention across push, email, in-app, SMS
AI targeting for churn and winback campaigns
Cheaper than Braze at comparable scale
cons: Not IAP optimization despite category placement
Less proven than Braze and Iterable at enterprise scale
review.verdict: Capable multi-channel CRM for app retention, but miscategorized as IAP; compare it to Braze, CleverTap, OneSignal.
review.best_for: Subscription app teams running retention and winback campaigns.
review.not_for: Teams looking for paywalls, receipt validation or IAP infrastructure.
